name: Minsky · setup host
description: First-run setup. Prompts once for the dashboard's Tailscale hostname (e.g., mac-mini-1.tailscale.ts.net) and stores it as a shared `host` variable that the 5 polling Shortcuts (tokens-remaining, last-task-status, constraint-of-the-week, pause, resume) read at run time via Get-Variable + Combine-Text. Drops operator overhead from 25 manual URL substitutions to 1 input + 0-touch reuse.

prompt.prompt: Enter the Tailscale hostname for the Minsky dashboard (e.g., mac-mini-1.tailscale.ts.net)

anchor: Norman, The Design of Everyday Things, 1988 (affordance — make the parameterisation visible); Card & Mackinlay 1999 (calm tech — bounded operator cognitive load); user-story 005 (three-numbers Watch).
